parameters.name: where[field]
parameters.description: Filter by field. Shorthand: `where[name]=my-name` (equals). With operator: `where[name][eq]=my-name`, `where[name][contains]=ame`, `where[name][in]=a&where[name][in]=b`. Ops: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, like, ilike, in, contains.

parameters.name: order[field]
parameters.description: Sort by field. Shorthand: `order[name]=asc`. Explicit: `order[name][direction]=desc`. Multiple: `order[name]=asc&order[createdAt]=desc`.
